slide1.label: COPA Field Auditor
slide1.title: Your audit. Your impact.
slide1.body: You've been selected to evaluate real spaces. Every observation you record shapes quality standards for your community.

slide2.label: Offline-first
slide2.title: Works where you are
slide2.body: No signal on site? COPA saves everything locally and syncs automatically the moment you're back online. No audit is ever lost.

slide3.label: Guided workflows
slide3.title: Structured for speed
slide3.body: Step-by-step audit flows keep every evaluation consistent. Complete a full audit in minutes - not hours.

slide4.label: Anonymous by design
slide4.title: Your code, not your name
slide4.body: Your audits are submitted under a unique code - never your name. Your anonymity is guaranteed in every report.
